title: Earlier 2026-05-06 Publication-Gate Residue Follow-On Task Split Authoring
objective: Convert the next remaining earlier 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency publication-gate residue into separately executable follow-on packets instead of reopening those earlier gate records as one broad archive-demotion lane.
dependency_note: After Packet 179 closed the later boundary-doc publication-gate family, the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 gate residue no longer forms one truthful execution family. The host-workflow and workspace-authority gates around Packets 064, 067, and 072 form one branch, while the roadmap and PM-cockpit gates around Packets 075, 078, 080, and 082 form another. This packet authors those follow-ons separately so the remaining residue stays bounded by branch rather than being reopened as one broad 2026-05-06 archive rewrite.
authoring_scope: Create a ready execution packet for the earlier 2026-05-06 host-workflow and workspace-authority gate family.
Create a ready execution packet for the earlier 2026-05-06 roadmap and PM-cockpit gate family.
Update repo-owned status routing so the split is explicit and the next work can proceed as separate residue slices.
forbidden_scope: editing the historical target gate files themselves in this authoring packet
success_criteria: A ready packet spec exists for the host-workflow and workspace-authority gate family.

PROJECT_STATUS.md records the split so the next lane is explicit and bounded.
next_action: Execute Packet 181 or Packet 182 next. If both are needed, keep them as separate residue slices.
